overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles overhead. The scene depicts long dining tables filled with people beneath vaulted ceilings and towering stained glass windows, reminiscent of the Harry Potter Great Hall. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric candlelight and detailed stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and long dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the great hall from the rear entrance, overlooking the candlelit dining area

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking briskly from right to left across the foreground between tables

entered.detail: massive cylindrical stone pillar with carved details supporting the vaulted ceiling
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air forming clusters beneath the ceiling
tall gothic arched windows with blue and red stained glass at the far end of the hall
long wooden banquet tables lined with seated figures extending toward the windows
polished stone tile flooring with geometric patterns in the foreground
vertical banners hanging from the upper walls between the windows

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by floating candles overhead. Long dining tables stretch toward the far end where large stained glass windows rise behind the head table. Students are seated at the tables eating and conversing, while a single student walks across the foreground from right to left. The warm candlelight creates a magical atmosphere against the dark stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a magnificent gothic great hall where warm candlelight illuminates a scene of magical academic life. It begins with a wide view of the dark stone architecture, capturing thousands of floating candles that cast a golden glow over long dining tables. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts to the students seated throughout the hall eating and conversing beneath towering vaulted ceilings. The scene then draws attention to the far end of the room, where massive stained glass windows rise behind the head table, before a single student walks across the foreground from right to left.
